title: Additional JewelryZ
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Additional Jewelry mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Additional Jewelry mod.

This addon adds level requirements for jewelry in the Addtional Jewelry mod to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add Additional Jewelry to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
